narrative:
Walnut C (precinct in Fairfield County) has 1,093 registered voters, with 48.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.3 percentage points.
